title: Planner via Model Router (brief -> steps, no hardcoded model)

implement.detail: lib/planner.mjs (buildPlannerPrompt with 8 step types + connector catalog + brief; parsePlan fenced/bare JSON; planFromBrief -> validated Automation, injectable invoke); backend src/app/api/automations/plan (internal-token guarded; resolveRoute picks target=no hardcoded model; sends BINDING body.classification {taskType,tier} the gateway honors; fail-closed on broken routing config); server /api/automations/plan-from-brief (brief+catalog discovery -> plan -> save)

test.detail: automations-planner.test (5): prompt names step types+catalog+brief, parse fenced/bare/reject, planFromBrief validated automation via mock invoke, rejects dropped step type (ekoa_action). typecheck clean; validate 4/4.

codexReview.detail: R1: (F1 high) resolved route not sent to gateway -> send binding classification hint; (F2 med) routing failures swallowed -> fail-closed on broken config. R2: F2 confirmed; F1 hint shape wrong -> FIXED to body.classification.{taskType,tier} (verified against gateway parseClassificationHint in souls-route.mjs). No hardcoded model.

codexPwTest.detail: live Router+gateway path exercised in Z1
